name: Doctor Love Edition
original_name: รักนี้เวอร์ชั่นคุณหมอ
overview: Celine, a famous actress, has been experiencing nightmares for over 5 years. She has sought treatment in many places without success, until she met a new therapist named Pim. Celine was immediately drawn to Pim's personality, which was unlike anyone else she had met. Meeting Pim also led her to Pat, Pim's real brother, who knew certain secrets about her and was the cause of Celine's nightmares.

trailers.title: TEASER ❘ GL Mini Series ❘ รักนี้เวอร์ชั่นคุณหมอ ( Doctor Love Edition )
